message:
feat(FJ-P2C-007-F): differential oracle + metamorphic + adversarial tests

5 oracle tests (double, sum3, negate_vec, value roundtrip, error prop),
4 metamorphic tests (marshal identity, error-no-corrupt, empty noop,
double composition), 6 adversarial tests (unregistered target, dup reg,
buffer mismatch, concurrent FFI, callback error, callback arity).
15 conformance tests total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
